title: Login button not responding
description: Clicking login does not trigger API call.

title: Add dark mode support
description: Users want dark mode for better accessibility.

description: Allow users to download reports as CSV files.

description: Adding product does not increment navbar counter.

description: Interface should support English, Bengali, Arabic.

description: Frequently asked questions for users.

description: Users want manual switch for dark/light mode.
